debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
integral_X : ∀ (i : ι), ∫ (ω : Ω), X i ω ∂μ = 0
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
X₁ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X i ∘ Prod.fst
X₂ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X i ∘ Prod.snd
X' : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X₁ i - X₂ i
this : DecidableEq ι
⊢ ∫ (ω : Ω), ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ≤ ∫ (ω : Ω × Ω), ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ

failed_attempts: simpa [X', X₁, X₂] using (le_trans (le_of_eq (by simp)) (le_rfl))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
        (le_trans (le_of_eq (by
          simpa using (integral_prod_left (μ := μ) (f := fun ω : Ω ↦ ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m)))))
        (le_of_eq (by
          simpa using (integral_prod_right (μ := μ) (f := fun ω : Ω ↦ ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m))))))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg] using
        (le_trans (le_of_eq (by
          simp [Measure.prod, MeasureTheory.integral_prod, MeasureTheory.integral_const, pow_mul]))
          (le_of_eq (by
            simp [Measure.prod, MeasureTheory.integral_prod, MeasureTheory.integral_const, pow_mul])))
simpa [X', X₁, X₂]

simpa [X', X₁, X₂] using (le_integral_prod_mul_norm_sub_pow_two_mul (μ := μ) (A := A)
        (X := X) (m := m))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, Function.comp, sub_eq_add_neg] using
        (le_trans (le_of_eq (by
          simp [Measure.integral_prod, MeasureTheory.integral_const, iIndepFun_X.aemeasurable,
            MeasureTheory.integral_integral_swap, MeasureTheory.integral_integral, Measure.prod_prod,
            MeasureTheory.integral_snd, MeasureTheory.integral_fst])) (le_rfl))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg] using
        (le_trans (le_of_eq (by
          simp [Measure.prod_apply, Measure.univ_prod_univ, Measure.univ, integral_const,
            measure_univ, one_mul, mul_one])) (le_rfl))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
        (le_of_eq (by
          simpa using
            (integral_prod_left_eq_integral (μ := μ) (f := fun ω : Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m)))))
simpa [X', X₁, X₂, Pi.sub_apply, integral_prod_left, Measure.integral_prod, integral_X]
simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg, Measure.prod, MeasureTheory.integral_prod_left]

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg, integral_prod_mul, measure_univ, one_mul] using
        (ProbabilityTheory.marcinkiewicz_zygmund_symmetrization (μ := μ) (A := A) (m := m) (X := X))
simpa [X', X₁, X₂] using (le_trans (le_of_eq (by simp)) (le_abs_self _))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg, integral_prod_left] using
        (le_of_eq (by
          simp [MeasureTheory.integral_prod, MeasureTheory.integral_const, integral_X]))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂] using
        (MeasureTheory.integral_norm_sum_pow_le_integral_norm_sum_sub_pow_prod
          (μ := μ) (A := A) (X := X) (m := m)
          (integral_X := integral_X))
simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg, integral_prod_left, integral_prod_right, integral_X]
simpa [X', X₁, X₂]

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg, Function.comp, Measure.integral_prod_left] using
        (le_of_eq (by
          simp [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg, Function.comp, Measure.integral_prod_left]))
simpa [X', X₁, X₂]

simpa using (le_trans (le_of_eq (by
        simpa [X', X₁, X₂] using (by
          congr with ω
          simp))) (le_rfl))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂]
        using (le_trans (le_of_eq (by
          simpa using
            (integral_prod_left (μ := μ) (f := fun ω : Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m))).symm))
          (le_of_eq (by
            simpa using
              (integral_prod_right (μ := μ) (f := fun ω : Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m))).symm)))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg] using
        (le_of_eq (by
          simp [Measure.integral_prod, Measure.integral_const, -Measure.integral_prod, -Measure.integral_const]))
simpa [X', X₁, X₂]

simpa [X', X₁, X₂] using
        (le_trans (le_of_eq (by
          simpa using (integral_prod_left (μ := μ) (f := fun ω : Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m)))))
        (by
          have h :
              (∫ ω : Ω × Ω,
                  ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i (Prod.fst ω)‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ) ≤
                ∫ ω : Ω × Ω,
                  ‖∑ i ∈ A, (X i (Prod.fst ω) - X i (Prod.snd ω))‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ := by
                have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (2 * m : ℕ) := by exact Nat.zero_le _
                simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using
                  (MeasureTheory.integral_norm_sum_pow_le_integral_norm_sum_sub_pow (μ := μ)
                    (A := A) (X := fun i (ω : Ω × Ω) => X i (Prod.fst ω))
                    (Y := fun i (ω : Ω × Ω) => X i (Prod.snd ω)) (m := m))
              exact h))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg, Function.comp] using
        (le_of_eq (by
          simpa using
            (integral_prod_fst (μ := μ)
              (f := fun ω : Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m))))
simpa [X', X₁, X₂]
simpa [X', X₁, X₂] using (le_trans (le_of_eq (by simp)) (le_abs_self _))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂] using
        (le_trans (le_of_eq (by
          simpa [Measure.prod_apply, Set.preimage, Function.comp] using
            (integral_prod_left (μ := μ) (f := fun ω : Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m))).symm))
        (le_of_eq (by
          have h :
              (fun ω : Ω × Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i (Prod.fst ω)‖ ^ (2 * m)) =
                fun ω : Ω × Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X₁ i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) := by
                  funext ω; simp [X₁]
          simp [h]))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg] using
        (le_trans (le_of_eq (by
          simpa using
            (Measure.integral_prod_const (μ := μ) (f := fun ω : Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m))).symm))
          (by
            have h :
                (fun ω : Ω × Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω.1‖ ^ (2 * m)) ≤
                  fun ω : Ω × Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) := by
                intro ω
                simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg] using
                  (le_pow_of_nonneg (by positivity) (norm_sum_le_norm_sum_add_norm_sum_neg (A := A)
                    (X := fun i => X i ω.1) (Y := fun i => X i ω.2)))
            exact integral_mono h))

simpa [X', X₁, X₂, Function.comp, sub_eq_add_neg] using
        (le_of_eq (by
          simp [Measure.prod_apply, Measure.univ, Function.comp, sub_eq_add_neg]))

simpa [X', X₁] using
        (le_trans (le_of_eq (by
          simpa using (integral_prod_left (μ := μ) (f := fun ω : Ω => ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m)))))
          (le_abs_self _))
